# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: project_id
    type: google-cloud.core/Project
    properties: |+
      id: YOURPROJECTIDHERE # replace with your Google Cloud Project ID here (required)  
      
  - name: bucketName
    type: google-cloud.storage.Bucket
    properties:| +
      name: 'yourbucketsname'     //Replace this value by the storage you want to have for websites assets ('static_assets')        
      location: us            # replace it with your preferred region (default is "us" or United States, not US)  
    dependsOn: ['project_id'] 
      
variables:    
- name: projectIdVar        // this variable will store the ID of our gcp Project. This can be used in other resources as needed         
 - type: google-cloud.core/Project#getLatestCommonReference     
   properties: | +            # get latest common reference for a resource, here we are looking to use it later (it's useful if you have more than one gcp project) 
     idRef: &idref |       // provide the Id of your Project Resource in YAML file above this line. You must replace YOURPROJECTIDHERE by ID from earlier step and change bucketName accordingly   "YOURBUCKETNAME"    #Replace it with Your Bucket Name here (Required)
     projectId: &projectid | // provide the Id of your Project Resource in YAML file above this line. You must replace YOURPROJECTIDHERE by ID from earlier step and change bucketName accordingly   "YOURBUCKETNAME"    #Replace it with Your Bucket Name here (Required)
     dependsOn: ['project_id']  // make sure the project id is fetched first before trying to set any property on Project.Resource object in YAML file above this line       
     
   schemaValidationMethod : NONE |          /// Schema validation method for defining resource properties (NONE or If you are using GVK/IGRD based templates, it will be one of the available options - DRAFT and PUBLISH)  It is optional if not used with above examples.
